instruction: Read the value of 'username' from the XML file at /test/user.xml.
args:
{'command': "python3 - <<'PY'
import xml.etree.ElementTree as ET
path='/test/user.xml'
tree=ET.parse(path)
root=tree.getroot()
# find first element named username anywhere
el=root.find('.//username')
print(el.text if el is not None else '')
PY"}

instruction: Read the value of 'username' from the XML file at /test/user.xml.

import xml.etree.ElementTree as ET
path='/test/user.xml'
tree=ET.parse(path)

# Find first element named 'username'

print(el.text if el is not None else '')
PY"}
